input_text: Tanah kampung kita dah kena rampas dengan kaum pendatang, siap buat kuil lagi. Kalau kerajaan tak halang, kita sendiri yang kena bertindak usir mereka keluar.
reason: Frames a land dispute as ethnic invasion and calls for vigilante eviction. Incites unlawful action against a specific community under communal pretexts.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tanah di kampung ini perlu diselesaikan melalui saluran undang-undang. Semua pihak perlu hormati proses perundangan dan hak masing-masing.

input_text: Sekolah vernakular ni punca perpecahan bangsa. Tutup semua sekolah Cina dan Tamil, biar budak-budak tu belajar jadi rakyat Malaysia betul.
reason: Attacks vernacular education as divisive and implies students attending these schools are not 'real' Malaysians. Inflammatory rhetoric targeting minority education rights.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan kita boleh diperbaiki dengan memperkukuh perpaduan tanpa menghapuskan hak pendidikan mana-mana komuniti.

input_text: Jiran Cina aku buat babi panggang kat luar rumah, memang sengaja nak provoke kita orang Islam. Kita patut buat demo depan rumah dia sampai dia pindah.
reason: Interprets a neighbour's cooking as religious provocation and incites organised harassment to force them from their home. Escalates a personal grievance into communal confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada isu kejiranan, boleh berbincang secara baik atau rujuk pihak berkuasa tempatan untuk penyelesaian yang adil kepada semua pihak.

input_text: Syarikat GLC semua dikuasai satu kaum je, kaum lain cuma jadi kuli. Memang dasar apartheid Malaysia ni, patut kita boikot semua produk mereka.
reason: Frames workplace ethnic composition as apartheid and calls for boycotts targeting an entire ethnic group's businesses. Inflames communal tensions through misleading comparisons.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kepelbagaian dalam sektor GLC boleh dibincangkan secara konstruktif. Dasar pengambilan pekerja perlu adil dan telus untuk semua rakyat.

input_text: Dah la tanah rizab Melayu kena jual kat developer Cina, lepas tu buat kondominium mahal yang orang kampung tak mampu beli. Bangsa kita dijajah semula.
reason: Frames property development as ethnic recolonisation. Uses emotive language about Malay reserve land to incite hostility against a specific ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pembangunan tanah rizab perlu dipantau agar hak penduduk asal terjaga. Pihak berkuasa perlu pastikan pembangunan memberi manfaat kepada semua.

input_text: Viral! Orang India rompak kedai emas kat Klang semalam. Memang dah jadi budaya kaum ni. Share supaya semua orang berjaga-jaga dengan mereka.
reason: Attributes a single crime to an entire ethnicity and calls it their 'culture.' Spreads ethnic stereotyping through viral misinformation about crime waves.
suggested_rewrite: Ada kes rompakan kedai emas di Klang. Pihak polis sedang menyiasat. Semua penduduk diminta berhati-hati dan laporkan aktiviti mencurigakan.

input_text: Budak sekolah Cina tak reti cakap Melayu pun boleh dapat biasiswa? Patut la negara mundur. Baik hantar balik ke negara asal datuk nenek diorang.
reason: Attacks Chinese school students with 'go back to your country' rhetoric and questions their right to educational opportunities. Dehumanising and exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem biasiswa patut telus dan berasaskan merit. Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak mendapat peluang pendidikan tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Kerajaan bagi tanah kat orang India buat kuil, tapi surau kita nak renovate pun susah dapat kelulusan. Ni bukan negara Islam ke?
reason: Creates a false equivalence between religious building approvals to stoke interfaith resentment. Frames communal relations as zero-sum religious competition.
suggested_rewrite: Proses kelulusan bangunan ibadat perlu telus untuk semua agama. Jika ada masalah, boleh kemukakan aduan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan.

input_text: Aku share senarai nama dan nombor telefon peniaga Cina yang cekik harga kat pasar tu. Jom kita serang review Google diorang sampai lingkup.
reason: Doxxing personal information of traders identified by ethnicity and coordinating a review-bombing campaign. Combines privacy violation with targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau rasa harga barang tidak berpatutan, boleh buat aduan kepada KPDNHEP. Jangan dedahkan maklumat peribadi orang lain secara terbuka.

input_text: Kawasan perumahan kita dah jadi macam Little India. Bau kari merata, bising tak sudah. Kena halau semua sebelum harga rumah jatuh.
reason: Dehumanises Indian residents by reducing them to negative stereotypes and calls for their removal from a neighbourhood. Ethnically targeted hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap penduduk ada hak tinggal di mana-mana kawasan. Isu kejiranan boleh diselesaikan melalui dialog dan peraturan komuniti yang adil.

input_text: Quota Bumiputera dalam pekerjaan ni buat kaum lain jadi parasit yang tak layak tapi dapat kerja. Memang dasar bodoh, patut hapuskan terus.
reason: Labels Bumiputera beneficiaries as 'parasites' while attacking affirmative action. Dehumanising language that inflames ethnic tensions around employment policy.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pekerjaan Bumiputera boleh dinilai semula secara objektif untuk memastikan keadilan dan kecekapan tanpa menghina mana-mana pihak.

input_text: Hari tu nampak geng Bangla 10 orang jalan kat taman. Confirm diorang ni penjenayah, memang patut halau keluar negara semua.
reason: Baselessly accuses migrant workers of being criminals simply for walking in a park. Promotes xenophobic generalisations and incites hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan taman perumahan penting untuk semua penduduk. Jika ada aktiviti mencurigakan, hubungi pihak polis untuk tindakan sewajarnya.

input_text: Dengar cerita developer tu bayar rasuah kat orang kampung Melayu supaya jual tanah murah. Dah macam penjajah Cina zaman moden. Bangun la Melayu!
reason: Spreads unverified bribery allegations framed as ethnic conquest. Uses colonial rhetoric to inflame Malay ethnonationalist sentiments against Chinese developers.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada dakwaan rasuah dalam urusan tanah, laporkan kepada SPRM dengan bukti. Isu ini perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang.

input_text: Ustaz cakap belajar bahasa Mandarin haram, sebab tu bahasa kafir. Sekolah vernakular ni memang agenda Kristianisasi terselindung.
reason: Fabricates a religious ruling to delegitimise Mandarin education and spreads the conspiracy theory that vernacular schools are Christianisation tools.
suggested_rewrite: Belajar pelbagai bahasa adalah kelebihan. Tiada larangan agama terhadap pembelajaran bahasa dan sekolah vernakular beroperasi mengikut undang-undang pendidikan negara.

input_text: Restoran mamak tu dah diboikot sebab owner sokong parti pembangkang. Sini ada senarai kedai-kedai yang kena boikot, semua kaum India punya.
reason: Disguises ethnically targeted economic boycott as political action. Creates an exclusion list targeting Indian-owned businesses based on communal identity.
suggested_rewrite: Sokongan politik adalah hak individu. Jangan boikot perniagaan berdasarkan kaum pemilik. Ekonomi negara bergantung kepada kerjasama semua komuniti.

input_text: Orang Melayu yang kerja kat syarikat Cina memang kena buli setiap hari. Takde maruah langsung, macam hamba abdi. Jom boikot semua syarikat Cina.
reason: Generalises workplace issues into ethnic victimhood narrative and calls for boycott of all Chinese-owned companies. Escalates individual grievances into communal conflict.
suggested_rewrite: Isu buli di tempat kerja perlu dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Hak pekerja dilindungi undang-undang tanpa mengira latar belakang majikan.

input_text: Aku kenal orang dalam, kes rogol budak India tu sebenarnya tak wujud. Kaum diorang memang suka buat cerita untuk dapat simpati.
reason: Denies a reported crime and attributes fabrication to an entire ethnic group. Spreads harmful misinformation while undermining victims from a specific community.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap laporan jenayah perlu disiasat dengan teliti oleh pihak berkuasa. Jangan buat kesimpulan atau tuduhan tanpa bukti yang sahih.

input_text: Tanah wakaf Islam kat KL tu dah kena ambil buat shopping mall oleh kroni bukan Islam. Umat Islam kena bangkit pertahankan hak kita sebelum semua hilang.
reason: Frames a land development issue as a religious theft by non-Muslims and calls for communal mobilisation. Mixes unverified claims with religious alarm.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tanah wakaf perlu disemak oleh Majlis Agama Islam. Jika ada kebimbangan, saluran aduan rasmi boleh digunakan untuk memastikan hak terpelihara.

input_text: Baru dapat info — geng Myanmar dah masuk kampung kita, mereka rancang nak rompak rumah-rumah kosong waktu Raya. Forward cepat kat semua group!
reason: Spreads unverified crime wave rumour targeting Myanmar refugees. Creates panic and hostility against a vulnerable migrant community through fabricated viral warnings.
suggested_rewrite: Pastikan rumah selamat semasa musim perayaan. Jika ada maklumat jenayah, laporkan terus kepada polis dan jangan sebarkan berita yang belum disahkan.

input_text: Peguam tu memang sengaja kalahkan kes orang Melayu sebab dia kaum Cina. Semua peguam bukan Melayu memang tak boleh dipercayai.
reason: Accuses a lawyer of ethnic bias without evidence and generalises distrust to all non-Malay legal professionals. Ethnically motivated professional defamation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak berpuas hati dengan khidmat peguam, buat aduan kepada Majlis Peguam. Kemampuan profesional tidak ditentukan oleh kaum seseorang.

input_text: Dah 3 kes ragut kat Cheras minggu ni, semua pelaku orang India. Memang DNA kaum ni suka mencuri. Tag polis biar viral.
reason: Attributes crime to ethnic DNA — a deeply dehumanising claim that racialises criminal behaviour and spreads unverified crime statistics to incite hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Kes ragut di Cheras perlu perhatian polis. Semua penduduk diminta berhati-hati dan laporkan sebarang kejadian kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Mak cik sebelah rumah aku kahwin Cina, lepas tu anak dia dah tak puasa tak solat. Inilah akibat campur kaum, rosak iman generasi kita.
reason: Uses a specific interfaith family to attack interracial marriage as destructive to religious identity. Promotes communal segregation through religious shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur adalah pilihan peribadi. Pendidikan agama dalam keluarga bergantung kepada banyak faktor dan bukan hak kita untuk menghakimi orang lain.

input_text: Kilang tu ambil pekerja kaum dia je, orang Melayu mohon semua kena reject. Memang rasis, patut kita serbu kilang tu ramai-ramai.
reason: Alleges ethnic hiring discrimination and incites a mob to storm a factory. Escalates a workplace complaint into potential violent confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada diskriminasi dalam pengambilan pekerja, buat aduan rasmi kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Isu ini perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang.

input_text: Kawasan Sungai Buloh dah jadi sarang penjenayah Myanmar. Malam-malam diorang berkeliaran cari mangsa. Kita kena buat rondaan sendiri, jangan harap polis.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about migrant criminality and encourages vigilante patrols. Combines misinformation with incitement to take law enforcement into own hands.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan keselamatan di kawasan anda, hubungi polis dan sertai program Rukun Tetangga untuk bekerjasama menjaga keselamatan komuniti.

input_text: Sekolah Tamil tu dah usang macam kandang lembu, patutlah budak-budak dari situ pun perangai macam binatang. Tutup je semua sekolah Tamil.
reason: Compares Tamil school students to animals and their school to an animal pen. Extremely dehumanising language targeting minority education institutions and children.
suggested_rewrite: Infrastruktur sekolah Tamil perlu dinaik taraf oleh kerajaan. Semua pelajar berhak mendapat persekitaran pembelajaran yang selesa dan berkualiti.

input_text: Ini nombor telefon ketua kampung yang approve jual tanah Melayu kat developer Cina. Kita kena bagi pengajaran kat pengkhianat bangsa ni.
reason: Doxxes a village head's phone number and incites retaliation against them for a land deal. Combines privacy violation with threats of vigilante punishment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang penjualan tanah, kemukakan aduan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa negeri. Jangan dedahkan maklumat peribadi atau ugut sesiapa.

input_text: Orang Cina memang tamak, dah kuasai ekonomi masih nak rampas tanah orang Melayu. Kalau tak bertindak sekarang, anak cucu kita jadi pengemis di tanah sendiri.
reason: Uses ethnic stereotypes about greed and land grabbing to incite fear and urgency. Dehumanises Chinese Malaysians and frames coexistence as existential threat.
suggested_rewrite: Isu ekonomi dan hak tanah perlu dibincangkan secara rasional. Semua rakyat Malaysia mempunyai hak dan tanggungjawab dalam pembangunan negara.

input_text: Confirm kes bunuh kat Setapak tu pasal gaduh tanah antara Melayu dengan India. Polis tutup cerita sebab takut rusuhan. Korang fikir-fikir la sendiri.
reason: Fabricates an ethnic motive for a murder case and alleges police cover-up. Uses insinuation to stoke communal paranoia and distrust of authorities.
suggested_rewrite: Kes bunuh di Setapak sedang disiasat polis. Jangan buat spekulasi tentang motif sebelum siasatan selesai. Percayai proses undang-undang.

input_text: Aku dah senaraikan 15 kedai makan Cina yang guna babi dan tak label halal. Ada nama dan alamat penuh. Biar kita hukum sendiri.
reason: Publishes a list of businesses with addresses and incites vigilante 'punishment' over halal concerns. Weaponises religious sensitivity for targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelabelan halal boleh dilaporkan kepada JAKIM untuk tindakan rasmi. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri atau dedahkan maklumat perniagaan tanpa pengesahan.

input_text: Pergi TikTok tengok video budak Rohingya pukul orang Malaysia. Ni bukan satu dua, memang semua Rohingya ni ganas, biadap. Usir semua!
reason: Generalises a video incident to an entire refugee community and calls for their mass expulsion. Spreads xenophobic misinformation through selective viral content.
suggested_rewrite: Insiden keganasan perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa tanpa mengira latar belakang pelaku. Jangan generalkan tingkah laku individu kepada seluruh komuniti.

input_text: Surau kampung kita nak kena roboh sebab developer nak buat highway. Developer tu Cina bukan Islam. Ini serangan terhadap Islam. Kita mesti pertahankan sampai titisan darah terakhir.
reason: Frames an infrastructure project as a religious attack based on the developer's ethnicity and religion. Incites violent resistance framed as defending Islam.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada surau yang terjejas oleh projek pembangunan, masyarakat boleh menggunakan saluran undang-undang dan berunding dengan pihak berkuasa untuk penyelesaian terbaik.

input_text: Tanah pusaka kita dah 5 generasi tapi sekarang orang asing boleh beli. Kalau kerajaan tak jaga, kita yang kena jaga sendiri. Siapa berani, jumpa kat tanah tu Sabtu ni.
reason: Organises a confrontational gathering at a disputed land site under the guise of heritage protection. Implies readiness for physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Hak tanah pusaka perlu dilindungi melalui proses undang-undang. Dapatkan bantuan peguam atau Biro Bantuan Guaman untuk menyelesaikan isu ini.

input_text: Kerajaan bagi 50 ekar tanah untuk bina kuil Hindu baru tapi nak buat sekolah agama Islam setengah ekar pun susah. Ni dah terang-terang anti Islam.
reason: Fabricates wildly exaggerated land allocation figures to create a false narrative of anti-Muslim bias. Spreads religious misinformation to inflame interfaith resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Peruntukan tanah untuk bangunan keagamaan dan pendidikan perlu telus. Jika ada kebimbangan, dapatkan maklumat sahih daripada pihak berkuasa tempatan.

input_text: Hari ni aku kena marah dengan bos Cina sebab cakap Melayu kat office. Dia kata kalau nak cakap Melayu balik kampung tanam jagung la. Memang semua bos Cina macam ni.
reason: While the described incident may be real, generalising it to all Chinese bosses transforms a personal grievance into ethnic hostility and workplace polarisation.
suggested_rewrite: Saya ada pengalaman kurang baik di tempat kerja mengenai bahasa. Hak menggunakan bahasa kebangsaan dilindungi dan boleh dilaporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: Lepas PRU ni, kalau calon bukan Melayu menang, memang tamat la hak Bumiputera. Semua tanah akan kena jual kat pendatang. Jangan bagi peluang langsung kat mereka.
reason: Uses election fearmongering to portray non-Malay candidates as threats to Bumiputera rights. Inflames ethnic anxieties around land and political representation.
suggested_rewrite: Semua calon pilihan raya perlu dinilai berdasarkan dasar dan integriti mereka, bukan kaum. Hak perlembagaan dilindungi tanpa mengira siapa yang menang.

input_text: These vernacular schools are breeding grounds for anti-national sentiment. Chinese schools teach kids to be loyal to China, not Malaysia. Shut them all down now.
reason: Falsely claims vernacular schools promote loyalty to foreign nations. Spreads misinformation about minority education systems to incite hostility and calls for their closure.
suggested_rewrite: Vernacular schools operate under Malaysia's education framework. Discussions about educational reform should be based on facts and respect every community's right to mother-tongue education.

input_text: Just saw a video of Bangladeshi workers stealing from a construction site. This is what happens when you let these animals into our country. Deport them all.
reason: Dehumanises migrant workers as 'animals' based on a single video and demands mass deportation. Ethnically targeted abuse using dehumanising language.
suggested_rewrite: Theft at construction sites is a security issue that should be reported to authorities. Workers of all backgrounds deserve fair treatment and should not be collectively blamed.

input_text: The Malay quota system in universities is the biggest scam in this country. These lazy students take spots from deserving non-Bumis. Merit means nothing here.
reason: Labels Bumiputera students as lazy and undeserving. Uses dehumanising stereotypes to attack an entire community's academic capabilities under the guise of meritocracy debate.
suggested_rewrite: University admission policies can be debated constructively. All students work hard regardless of background, and reforms should focus on fairness without demeaning any group.

input_text: Breaking: Massive land grab in Penang! Chinese developers are bulldozing Malay kampung homes. The government doesn't care about us. Time to fight back physically.
reason: Frames a development project as ethnic land grab with fabricated urgency and explicitly calls for physical violence. Combines misinformation with incitement.
suggested_rewrite: If there are concerns about development affecting residential areas in Penang, residents can seek legal counsel and engage with local representatives through proper channels.

input_text: My Indian colleague got promoted over me even though I have better qualifications. Classic diversity hire. These people only get ahead because of sympathy, not talent.
reason: Dismisses a colleague's promotion as undeserved based on their ethnicity. Weaponises 'diversity hire' rhetoric to delegitimise minority professionals' achievements.
suggested_rewrite: I'm disappointed about the promotion decision. I'd like to understand the criteria better and work on improving my chances for future opportunities.

input_text: Anyone else notice how every snatch theft in KL involves the same race? Check the CCTV footage. Indians are genetically predisposed to crime. Facts don't care about your feelings.
reason: Promotes the pseudoscientific claim that criminality is genetic and ethnic. Masquerades racist stereotyping as factual analysis to normalise hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is a socioeconomic issue, not an ethnic one. Let's support evidence-based policing and community programs that address root causes of crime for everyone's safety.

input_text: These Tamil schools produce nothing but gangsters and mat rempit. Waste of taxpayer money. If they want Tamil education, go back to Tamil Nadu.
reason: Stigmatises Tamil school students as criminals, uses 'go back' rhetoric against citizens, and attacks their right to mother-tongue education. Deeply exclusionary and dehumanising.
suggested_rewrite: All national school systems, including Tamil schools, can be improved. Educational reform discussions should focus on quality and outcomes, not ethnic stereotyping.

input_text: Shared a fake news article about Chinese Malaysians smuggling drugs for triads. If you believe these people are loyal to Malaysia, you're delusional. They only care about money.
reason: Admits to sharing fake news to paint Chinese Malaysians as disloyal drug smugglers. Deliberately spreads misinformation to incite ethnic distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing unverified news is harmful. Drug trafficking is a criminal issue handled by authorities. Let's not stereotype any community based on the actions of individuals.

input_text: The company I work for has an unwritten rule — no Malays in management positions. It's disgusting. These Chinese towkays treat us like second-class citizens. All of them are the same.
reason: While workplace discrimination is a valid concern, generalising all Chinese business owners as discriminatory inflames communal hostility and ethnic polarisation.
suggested_rewrite: If there are discriminatory hiring practices at any workplace, they should be reported to the Labour Department. Systemic issues need proper investigation, not ethnic generalisation.

input_text: Posted the home address of the Malay landowner who sold ancestral land to a non-Bumi developer. Let everyone know where this traitor lives. Consequences are coming.
reason: Doxxes a person's home address and threatens retaliation for a legal land transaction. Combines privacy violation with intimidation and vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about land sales can be raised through proper legal channels. Sharing someone's personal address and making threats is illegal and dangerous.

input_text: Ethnic crime statistics don't lie — look at the prison demographics. Indians make up 7% of population but 40% of inmates. It's in their blood. Wake up Malaysia.
reason: Misuses statistics to claim criminality is inherent to an ethnic group. Presents racial essentialism as data-driven analysis to normalise ethnic hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Overrepresentation in prisons reflects socioeconomic inequalities, not ethnic traits. Addressing poverty, education access, and systemic barriers benefits all communities.

input_text: Why should non-Muslims get public holidays for their festivals? This is an Islamic country. Deepavali and CNY should be removed from the calendar. Only Hari Raya matters.
reason: Demands removal of non-Muslim public holidays and frames Malaysia as exclusively Islamic. Attacks constitutional protections of religious diversity and minority rights.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multicultural public holidays reflect our diverse society. The Constitution protects the rights of all religions, and festivals bring communities together.

input_text: I recorded this Malay Grab driver being racist to me on camera. Posting his car plate, full name, and IC number here. Let's make him famous for the wrong reasons.
reason: Publishes a driver's full personal details including IC number as retaliation. This is doxxing that exposes someone to identity theft and mob harassment.
suggested_rewrite: I had a bad experience with a ride-hailing driver. I've reported it through the app and to the authorities. Please don't share personal information of others online.

input_text: Every time there's a flood, these illegal immigrants loot our homes. I say we form neighbourhood patrols and deal with them ourselves. Police are useless anyway.
reason: Spreads the false narrative that immigrants are responsible for flood looting and incites formation of vigilante groups. Combines misinformation with incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Flood situations require community cooperation. If there are security concerns, work with local authorities and emergency services rather than taking matters into your own hands.

input_text: These Rohingya refugees are taking our jobs, our homes, and now they want citizenship too? Over my dead body. Malaysia for Malaysians only. Share if you agree.
reason: Demonises Rohingya refugees with false claims about them taking resources and seeking citizenship. Uses viral sharing mechanics to spread xenophobic nationalism.
suggested_rewrite: The refugee situation is complex and requires balanced policy discussions. Let's address concerns through proper channels while maintaining our humanitarian values.

input_text: Names and photos of the Tamil family that moved into our condo. They cook curry every day and the whole floor stinks. Everyone avoid them and make them feel unwelcome until they leave.
reason: Identifies a family by ethnicity, shares their details, and coordinates a campaign to make them unwelcome. Combines doxxing with organised ethnic discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Cooking odour concerns in shared spaces can be addressed through the condo management committee. All residents deserve to be treated with respect regardless of their background.

input_text: Corporate Malaysia is rigged. Non-Bumis dominate private sector hiring — Malays need not apply. This economic apartheid must end. We need to take back what's ours by any means.
reason: Uses 'apartheid' framing to describe private sector employment and implies willingness to use violence ('by any means') to change economic dynamics.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace diversity in the private sector can be improved through inclusive hiring practices and policy reforms. Constructive dialogue benefits all communities.

input_text: Exposed: Chinese syndicate buying up kampung land across Johor using Malay proxies. Here's the list of agents involved with their phone numbers. Spread before they delete this.
reason: Spreads conspiracy theory about ethnic land acquisition syndicate and doxxes alleged agents. Combines unverified claims with privacy violations.
suggested_rewrite: If there are concerns about irregular land transactions, report them to the land office or MACC with evidence. Do not share unverified allegations or personal details online.

input_text: I've compiled data showing Indian-majority areas have the highest crime rates in Selangor. Sharing the infographic — these areas are NO-GO ZONES for decent Malaysians.
reason: Creates misleading infographics linking Indian-majority areas to crime. Declares neighbourhoods 'no-go zones' based on ethnic demographics — a classic disinformation tactic.
suggested_rewrite: Crime statistics should be analysed in context of socioeconomic factors, not ethnicity. All neighbourhoods deserve investment in safety infrastructure for every resident.

input_text: Malaysian companies should fire all foreign workers and give the jobs to locals. These Indons and Banglas are stealing our bread. Round them up and send them home.
reason: Dehumanises foreign workers with 'round them up' language and calls for mass termination based on nationality. Uses dehumanising rhetoric against vulnerable migrant communities.
suggested_rewrite: Employment policies should balance local job opportunities with the labour needs of various industries. Workers' rights and dignity must be protected regardless of nationality.

input_text: Just heard from a reliable source that Rohingya gangs are planning coordinated robberies during Chinese New Year when Chinese families have cash at home. Stay armed and stay ready.
reason: Fabricates a targeted crime wave rumour against Rohingya refugees and calls for arming oneself. Combines ethnic misinformation with incitement to armed vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: During festive seasons, take standard home security precautions. If you receive crime warnings, verify with police before sharing. Report suspicious activity to authorities.

input_text: Indian estate workers should be grateful they even have jobs in Malaysia. Instead they demand higher wages and better housing. Ungrateful parasites draining our economy.
reason: Labels Indian estate workers as ungrateful parasites for advocating for workers' rights. Dehumanises a vulnerable community and attacks their right to fair labour conditions.
suggested_rewrite: All workers, including estate workers, have the right to fair wages and proper housing as guaranteed by labour laws. Worker welfare benefits the entire economy.

input_text: The real problem with this country is Chinese control of the media. They twist every story to make Malays look bad. We need to shut down all Chinese-owned media outlets.
reason: Promotes a conspiracy theory about ethnic media control and calls for shutting down Chinese-owned outlets. Attacks press freedom through an ethnic lens.
suggested_rewrite: Media accountability is important for all outlets regardless of ownership. Press freedom is protected by law and diverse media voices strengthen our democracy.

input_text: I refuse to rent my property to any Indian tenants. Last time I did, they destroyed the place and ran away without paying rent. Never again. All Indian tenants are the same.
reason: Announces discriminatory housing practices against all Indians based on one experience. Ethnic generalisation used to justify housing discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Bad tenant experiences happen across all backgrounds. Use proper tenant screening, references, and rental agreements to protect your property rather than discriminating by ethnicity.

input_text: Vernacular school graduates can barely pass BM exams but they want equal treatment in government hiring? Learn the national language first or go back where your ancestors came from.
reason: Attacks vernacular school graduates with 'go back' rhetoric and questions their right to government employment. Uses language proficiency as a proxy for ethnic exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Language proficiency requirements for government positions are set by the Public Service Commission. All qualified Malaysian citizens should have equal opportunity to apply.

input_text: 华人的土地又被马来人抢了！槟城的祖先留下来的地现在要建清真寺。我们要团结起来反对，绝不让步！
reason: Frames mosque construction as ethnic land grabbing and rallies communal resistance. Inflames Chinese-Malay tensions over land use and religious buildings.
suggested_rewrite: 土地规划问题可以通过合法途径解决。如果有异议，居民可以向地方政府提出申诉，寻求公平的解决方案。

input_text: 马来人只会靠配额拿工作，真正有能力的华人反而被排挤。这个国家的制度就是在养懒人，早晚要完蛋。
reason: Calls Bumiputera workers lazy and reliant on quotas. Dehumanises an entire ethnic group's work ethic while claiming ethnic superiority.
suggested_rewrite: 就业政策的公平性值得讨论，但不应以贬低任何族群的方式进行。所有马来西亚人都在为国家发展做出贡献。

input_text: 听说柔佛那边一群印度人抢了华人的店。这些人就是这样，偷抢是他们的本性。大家小心啊，转发出去！
reason: Spreads unverified crime rumour targeting Indians and claims criminal behaviour is innate to the ethnicity. Classic fake news designed to incite communal fear.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有犯罪事件发生，请向警方报案。不要传播未经证实的消息，更不要将个别事件归咎于某个族群。

input_text: 华文学校是我们的根本，马来人想关掉所有华校就是要灭掉我们的文化。这是文化灭绝！全体华人必须站起来抗争！
reason: Frames education policy discussions as cultural genocide and calls for ethnic mobilisation. Escalates legitimate concerns into inflammatory polarisation.
suggested_rewrite: 华文教育是马来西亚多元文化的重要组成部分。教育政策的讨论应通过建设性对话进行，确保所有社群的权益。

input_text: 这个马来邻居每天凌晨四点开大声公播祈祷，根本不尊重其他种族。我们要联合签名把他赶出这个社区。
reason: Frames the azan as ethnic disrespect and organises a campaign to expel a Muslim neighbour. Weaponises noise concerns into religious and communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 邻里间的噪音问题可以通过友好沟通或向居委会反映来解决。宗教活动是受法律保护的权利，大家应互相尊重。

input_text: 我朋友在马来公司工作，被欺负得很惨，工资被克扣还不让讲华语。所有马来老板都一样，歧视华人是他们的天性。
reason: Generalises one workplace complaint to all Malay employers and claims discrimination is their nature. Transforms individual experience into ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 职场歧视问题应向劳工局投诉。不应将个别雇主的行为推广到整个族群。每个人都有权在公平的环境中工作。

input_text: 传疯了！马来极端分子要在我们华人区建大型回教堂，占地五十亩。他们要把我们逼走！赶快分享这个消息！
reason: Spreads fabricated news about mosque construction with exaggerated land figures. Frames it as ethnic displacement to create panic and religious hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 建筑项目的信息应从官方渠道获取。不要传播未经证实的消息。土地规划问题可以通过合法途径提出异议。

input_text: 大马华人应该抵制所有马来人的店铺。他们不配赚我们的钱。只买华人的东西，支持自己人！
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott of all Malay-owned businesses. Promotes economic segregation along racial lines and frames commerce as ethnic loyalty.
suggested_rewrite: 支持本地商家是好事，但不应以种族来区分。马来西亚的经济发展需要各族群的合作与共同努力。

input_text: 这里有那个卖了华人祠堂地给马来开发商的人的住址和电话。大家去给他点颜色看看，让他知道出卖华人的下场！
reason: Doxxes personal address and phone number of someone and incites physical retaliation. Frames a property transaction as ethnic betrayal to justify vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对某项地产交易有异议，请通过法律途径解决。不要在网上公开他人的个人信息或威胁他人。

input_text: 槟城华人墓地被强拆建马来房屋！政府就是要消灭华人的历史！这笔账我们迟早要算！转发让全世界看看！
reason: Spreads unverified claims about cemetery demolition, frames it as ethnic cultural erasure, and implies future retaliation. Uses viral mechanics to inflame tensions.
suggested_rewrite: 历史文化遗产的保护是重要议题。如果有相关担忧，可以向文化遗产保护组织和地方政府反映，通过合法途径维护权益。

input_text: 外劳抢了我们的工作还到处犯罪。昨天又有缅甸人在巴刹偷东西被抓。这些人就该全部遣返，一个不留。
reason: Generalises one shoplifting incident to all Myanmar workers and demands mass deportation. Dehumanises migrant workers and promotes xenophobic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 个别犯罪事件应由执法部门处理。外劳为马来西亚经济做出重要贡献，不应因个别案例而歧视整个群体。

input_text: 华人在这个国家永远是二等公民。马来人拿走了所有好处，我们只能当奴隶。是时候组织起来反抗了。
reason: Uses slavery metaphor to describe Chinese Malaysian status and calls for organised resistance. Extreme polarisation language that could incite unlawful action.
suggested_rewrite: 对政策公平性的关注可以通过合法的政治参与和公民倡导来表达。马来西亚各族群应通过对话寻求共识。

input_text: 看到一个马来女生和华人男生牵手走在商场。真恶心，背叛自己种族的人不配活着。把她的照片发到网上让所有人看看。
reason: Expresses death-wish rhetoric against interracial couples and calls for doxxing. Combines extreme communal hostility with privacy violation threats.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人都有选择伴侣的自由。跨族恋爱是个人选择，我们应该尊重他人的感情和隐私。

input_text: 我们华人交那么多税，钱全被马来政府拿去养他们自己人。这个国家对华人就是个骗局。醒醒吧同胞们！
reason: Frames government spending as ethnic theft of Chinese taxpayer money. Promotes a victimhood narrative that inflames communal resentment and distrust.
suggested_rewrite: 税收分配的公平性是可以讨论的公共议题。建议通过查阅政府预算报告来了解实际情况，并通过民主渠道表达意见。

input_text: 印度人开的理发店越来越多，把我们华人的生意都抢光了。大家团结起来，只去华人的店，让他们全部关门！
reason: Calls for ethnic boycott of Indian-owned barbershops to drive them out of business. Promotes economic segregation and communal hostility in a competitive market.
suggested_rewrite: 商业竞争是正常的市场现象。支持本地商家是好事，但不应以种族来区分。健康的竞争对消费者有利。

input_text: மலாய் நிலங்களை சீனர்கள் அபகரிக்கிறார்கள் என்று சொல்வது பொய். உண்மையில் மலாய் அரசியல்வாதிகள் தான் தங்கள் சொந்த மக்களை ஏமாற்றுகிறார்கள். இரண்டு இனத்தையும் அடித்து விரட்ட வேண்டும்.
reason: Calls for violence against both Malay and Chinese communities in the context of a land dispute. Incites multi-directional ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: நில பிரச்சினைகள் அரசியல்வாதிகளால் சரியாக கையாளப்பட வேண்டும். சட்ட வழிகளில் தீர்வு காண வேண்டுமே தவிர வன்முறை பயன்படுத்தக்கூடாது.

input_text: இந்த மலாய் கம்பெனியில் இந்தியர்களை வேலைக்கு எடுக்க மாட்டார்கள். நம்ம ஆளுங்க எல்லாரும் சேர்ந்து அந்த கம்பெனியை தீ வைச்சு கொளுத்தணும்.
reason: Responds to alleged hiring discrimination by calling for arson against a business. Escalates a workplace issue into incitement of criminal violence.
suggested_rewrite: வேலை வாய்ப்பில் பாகுபாடு இருந்தால் தொழிலாளர் துறையில் புகார் செய்யலாம். சட்டப்படி நடவடிக்கை எடுப்பதே சரியான வழி.

input_text: தமிழ்ப் பள்ளிகளை மூட வேண்டும் என்று சொல்பவர்களின் பெயர் பட்டியல் இங்கே உள்ளது. அவர்களின் வீட்டு முகவரியும் கொடுக்கிறேன். நம்ம மக்கள் என்ன செய்யணும்னு தெரியும்.
reason: Doxxes individuals who oppose Tamil schools and implies organised retaliation. Combines privacy violation with veiled incitement to vigilante action.
suggested_rewrite: தமிழ்ப் பள்ளிகளின் உரிமைகளை சட்ட வழிகளில் பாதுகாக்கலாம். யாருடைய தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களையும் வெளியிடுவது சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: சீனர்கள் எல்லா தொழிலையும் கைப்பற்றிவிட்டார்கள். இந்தியர்களுக்கு எதுவும் மிச்சம் இல்லை. நம்ம ஆளுங்களை மட்டும் ஆதரிங்க, சீன கடைகளை புறக்கணியுங்க.
reason: Promotes ethnic boycott of Chinese businesses and frames economic activity as zero-sum ethnic competition. Incites communal economic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: எல்லா சமூகங்களும் பொருளாதாரத்தில் பங்களிக்கின்றன. உள்ளூர் வணிகங்களை இன அடிப்படையில் பாகுபடுத்தாமல் ஆதரிப்போம்.

input_text: மலாய் அரசு இந்து கோவில்களை இடிக்க திட்டம் போடுகிறது. இது மத அழிப்பு. எல்லா இந்துக்களும் ஒன்று சேர்ந்து போராடணும், இல்லன்னா நம்ம மதம் அழிஞ்சிடும்.
reason: Spreads unverified claims of systematic temple demolition and frames it as religious genocide. Incites communal mobilisation through religious fear.
suggested_rewrite: கோவில் இடமாற்றம் பற்றிய தகவல்களை அதிகாரபூர்வ ஆதாரங்களிலிருந்து உறுதிப்படுத்துங்கள். சட்ட வழிகளில் உரிமைகளை பாதுகாக்கலாம்.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் மியான்மார் அகதிகள் நிறைய குற்றங்கள் செய்கிறார்கள் என்று கேள்விப்பட்டேன். நாமே ஒரு குழு அமைத்து அவர்களை அடித்து விரட்டணும்.
reason: Spreads unverified crime allegations about Myanmar refugees and explicitly calls for organised violence against them. Combines misinformation with incitement.
suggested_rewrite: பாதுகாப்பு கவலைகள் இருந்தால் காவல் துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சட்டத்தை நம் கையில் எடுப்பது தவறு.

input_text: எங்க தாத்தா காலத்து நிலத்தை மலாய் அரசாங்கம் பறித்துக்கொண்டது. இந்தியர்களுக்கு இங்கே எந்த உரிமையும் இல்லை. புரட்சி வரும் நாள் வெகு தொலைவில் இல்லை.
reason: Frames land dispossession as ethnic oppression and implies revolutionary violence is coming. Uses historical grievance to incite potential insurrection.
suggested_rewrite: நில உரிமை பிரச்சினைகள் வரலாற்று ரீதியாக முக்கியமானவை. சட்ட ஆலோசனை பெற்று முறையான வழிகளில் நீதி கோரலாம்.

input_text: இந்த ஊரில் சீன கடைகளில் வேலை செய்யும் இந்தியர்களை நாய் மாதிரி நடத்துகிறார்கள். எல்லா சீனர்களும் இன வெறியர்கள். அவங்களுக்கு பாடம் கற்பிக்கணும்.
reason: Generalises individual workplace mistreatment to all Chinese people and calls for retaliation. Combines ethnic stereotyping with implied threats.
suggested_rewrite: பணியிடத்தில் தவறான நடத்தை இருந்தால் தொழிலாளர் துறையில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். தனிநபர் செயல்களை ஒரு இனம் முழுவதுக்கும் பொதுமைப்படுத்தக்கூடாது.

input_text: நேற்று ராத்திரி பங்களாதேஷ் தொழிலாளர்கள் ஒரு தமிழ் பெண்ணை துரத்தினார்கள். இது எல்லா நாளும் நடக்குது. வெளிநாட்டவர்களை எல்லாம் அடிச்சு விரட்டணும்.
reason: Spreads unverified assault allegation and claims it happens daily to incite violence against foreign workers. Combines misinformation with explicit incitement.
suggested_rewrite: பாதுகாப்பு சம்பவங்களை உடனடியாக காவல்துறையில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். சட்டத்தை கையில் எடுக்காமல் அதிகாரிகளை நம்புங்கள்.

input_text: மலாய் அரசாங்கம் தமிழர்களின் நிலங்களை அபகரித்து மலாய்க்காரர்களுக்கு கொடுக்கிறது. இது நம் மண், நம் உரிமை. தெருவில் இறங்கி போராடுவோம், வேறு வழி இல்லை.
reason: Alleges systematic land confiscation from Tamils and calls for street protests as the only option. Incites potential unlawful assembly over unverified claims.
suggested_rewrite: நில உரிமை பிரச்சினைகளை சட்ட ஆலோசகர்கள் மூலம் சரியான வழிகளில் தீர்க்கலாம். அமைதியான முறையில் மனு அளிப்பது சிறந்த வழி.

input_text: Bro this viral video showing Bangla workers beating up a local Malay guy is FAKE but I'm sharing anyway cuz these immigrants mmg problematic. Nak share jugak kat semua group.
reason: Admits the video is fake but deliberately spreads it anyway to reinforce anti-immigrant sentiment. Knowingly promotes misinformation for ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing content you know is fake is irresponsible and harmful. If there are genuine safety concerns about any community, report them to authorities with verified information.

input_text: Apahal sekolah Cina kat area kita ni boleh expand lagi? Meanwhile surau kecik kita nak repair pun council reject. Ini memang agenda nak hapuskan Islam. Fight back guys!
reason: Creates a false zero-sum comparison between Chinese school expansion and surau maintenance. Frames it as an anti-Islam agenda to incite communal conflict.
suggested_rewrite: Both education facilities and places of worship deserve proper support. If there are concerns about council decisions, raise them through official complaint channels.

input_text: Guys aku ada full list of tanah rezab Melayu yang dah kena convert jadi freehold and sold to non-Bumis. Siap ada nama semua orang involved. DM me for the list, let's expose them.
reason: Offers to distribute personal information of people involved in land transactions. Frames legal property dealings as ethnic betrayal to justify doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about Malay reserve land conversions should be directed to the state land office. Do not distribute personal information — report suspected irregularities through official channels.

input_text: TikTok live semalam ada org India mengamuk kat 7-Eleven. Satu kaum mmg perangai camtu. Tag polis, tag MP, biar semua orang tau kaum mana yang buat masalah.
reason: Attributes one person's behaviour to their entire ethnicity and coordinates a viral campaign to associate crime with a specific race. Racialises an isolated incident.
suggested_rewrite: Individual incidents should not be used to stereotype an entire community. If you witnessed a crime, report it directly to police with factual details.

input_text: Company aku baru hire 5 orang Cina for senior positions, padahal ada ramai Malay candidates yang more qualified. Ini la systematic racism against Bumis. These Chinese ppl mmg tak boleh dipercaya.
reason: Frames specific hiring decisions as systematic racism and declares an entire ethnic group untrustworthy. Conflates workplace grievance with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe hiring decisions were unfair, raise the issue with HR or the Labour Department. Merit assessments should be transparent, and concerns addressed through proper channels.

input_text: Weh korang tau tak, kawasan tu dah jadi sarang penagih sebab banyak sangat orang India duduk situ. It's a fact la bro, check la crime statistics. Dekat-dekat pun jangan pergi.
reason: Links drug addiction and crime to Indian demographics. Disguises ethnic stereotyping as statistical fact and declares an area dangerous based on ethnic composition.
suggested_rewrite: Drug and crime issues require proper law enforcement attention regardless of the neighbourhood. If there are concerns, report them to police rather than blaming any community.

input_text: Baru balik dari interview kat Chinese company, dia straight up cakap 'we prefer Mandarin speakers'. Code word for 'no Malays'. These racist employers kena expose nama and address dia.
reason: While language-based hiring concerns are valid, calling for doxxing of employers escalates a legitimate grievance into vigilante exposure and privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Language-based hiring requirements should be reasonable and job-relevant. If you feel discriminated against, file a complaint with the Labour Department with documented evidence.

input_text: My neighbour buat kenduri korban kat rumah, darah lembu merata-rata. Geli siot. Ni la orang Melayu, backward and primitive. Should be banned in residential areas. So disgusting.
reason: Labels Islamic korban practice as primitive and disgusting, calling for its ban. Combines religious insult with dehumanising language targeting Malay-Muslim culture.
suggested_rewrite: Religious practices like korban have specific guidelines. If there are hygiene or space concerns, they can be discussed respectfully with neighbours or local council.

input_text: Tengok la WhatsApp forward ni — senarai orang Cina yang beli tanah Melayu kat Kelantan. Complete with IC number and phone. Let's make them pay. Kita orang takkan diam.
reason: Distributes a doxxing list with IC numbers and phone numbers of individuals. Threatens collective retaliation against people identified by ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing IC numbers and personal details is illegal under PDPA. Land transaction concerns should be reported to the land office, not handled through public shaming.

input_text: Ada satu article claim orang Rohingya dapat free housing from gomen while rakyat Malaysia struggling. Not verified but sharing anyway because it FEELS true. Kita kena wake up.
reason: Explicitly acknowledges content is unverified but shares it because it confirms biases. Deliberately spreads anti-refugee misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Before sharing any claims about government aid, verify with official sources. Spreading unverified information, even if it 'feels true', can cause real harm to vulnerable communities.

input_text: Kalau nak tahu kenapa crime kat Seremban makin teruk, just look at demographics. More Indians = more crime. It's basic maths bro. Don't call me racist, I'm just stating facts.
reason: Disguises ethnic profiling as mathematical fact. Correlates demographics with crime rates to normalise racism under the guise of objective analysis.
suggested_rewrite: Crime rates are linked to socioeconomic factors, not ethnicity. Supporting community development and proper policing benefits everyone regardless of demographics.

input_text: Sini ada screenshot gaji slip pekerja Malay kat Chinese company — way below minimum wage. Semua towkay Cina exploit Malay workers. Nama company and owner kat bawah. Let's cancel them.
reason: Shares private salary information and business owner details for mob action. Generalises one company's alleged violations to all Chinese employers.
suggested_rewrite: Minimum wage violations should be reported to the Labour Department with evidence. They will investigate. Do not share personal documents or call for mob action online.

input_text: Apesal RT area aku nak lantik committee member dari kaum Cina? This is OUR kampung la. Dari dulu Melayu je duduk sini. Non-Bumis should know their place and don't try to take over.
reason: Demands ethnic exclusion from community leadership roles. Uses 'know their place' rhetoric to suppress minority participation in local governance.
suggested_rewrite: Resident committees should include representatives from all communities living in the area. Diverse participation leads to better decisions for everyone.

input_text: Weh serious question — why do we still allow sekolah vernakular? It literally produces citizens yang tak reti BM, tak patriotik, and only loyal to their own kaum. Bubar semua!
reason: Falsely claims vernacular schools produce disloyal citizens and calls for their abolition. Attacks minority education rights and questions the patriotism of non-Malay Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: National unity can be strengthened while respecting mother-tongue education rights. Education reform should focus on improving quality across all school types.

input_text: Harini kena rejected loan sebab bukan Bumi. Meanwhile my Malay colleague yang barely qualified got approved senang je. This apartheid system makes me sick. These ppl don't deserve it.
reason: Uses 'apartheid' framing and says Bumiputera recipients don't deserve benefits. Dehumanises beneficiaries of affirmative action while expressing valid frustration in a hostile way.
suggested_rewrite: Loan approval processes should be transparent and fair. If you feel discriminated against, there are formal channels to appeal. Policy discussions should not target individuals.
